news.t: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
VanEck Launches NODE ETF: Actively Managed Exposure to the Growing Digital Assets Economy

holdings.infoBox: NODE is an equity ETF with a total of 62 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vaneck Onchain Subsidiary stock at 9.67%, TeraWulf at 6.72%, Cipher Digital at 6.11%, Hut 8 at 6.04%, and IREN Limited at 5.11%.

overview.description: The VanEck Onchain Economy ETF (NODE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed to invest in companies and instruments that are meaningfully tied to the on-chain economy, including blockchain infrastructure, digital asset servicing and digital asset exposure. Holdings are selected based on fundamentals and managed based on Bitcoin market cycle indicators. NODE was launched on May 13, 2025 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: Crypto ETFs: Blockchain Equities Reemerge

data.title: ETF Edge: How investors are handling geopolitical uncertainty and energy pricing whiplash
data.text: Energy markets around the world have been shaken up by geopolitical volatility, most notably in Venezuela and Iran. However, there's much more to the story beyond just those two countries.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck Launches NODE ETF: Actively Managed Exposure to the Growing Digital Assets Economy
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck launches NODE, provides exposure to digital transformation cos. & digital assets instruments, rebalanced using crypto market cycle indicators.
